title: 'UCC, Two Lakh Jobs': BJP Releases 'Sankalp Patra' For Assam Assembly Elections
description: BJP released its 'Sankalp Patra' for the 2026 Assam Assembly elections in Guwahati, with key figures like Union Ministers Nirmala Sitharaman and Sarbananda Sonowal in attendance. CM Himanta Biswa Sarma promised a Uniform Civil Code and two lakh jobs in five years, while vowing to make Assam flood-free with an investment of Rs 18,000 crore.
